programme.desc: Delve deep into the African waters and discover a new side of these prehistoric predators of the sea, while reconsidering the Hollywood portrayal which has done much to damage the reputation of these gentle creatures.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gary Brown's visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle when he and his guide are attacked by the colony's escaped alpha male. Idaho Zoo's 'Feast for the Beast' fundraiser takes a bloody turn when a 600-pound Siberian tiger breaks free.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The East Australian Grey Nurse is the only shark in the world that is critically endangered. More than 50% of the animals are carrying hooks and traces from fisherman's lines. Interaction with humans is endangering this animal.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Julia grapples with a massive python, before encountering a lightning fast whip snake and visiting a hospital to talk snake bites.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While diving for shellfish off Cape Howe, an Australian man ends up inside the jaws of a Great White shark. Determined to maintain his championship spear fishing title, an Australian man inadvertently becomes bait for a 15-foot-long Great White shark.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In pristine waters, in one of the most remote locations on earth, lives a mysterious species of shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Julia confronts her fear on heights while trying to wrangle a massive carpet python. Meanwhile, Johnny Must try to catch two of them. Later Julia has a close call with the worlds second deadliest snake.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ian Gordon has been recruited to help with a research project in Australia. He has the hard part of the project, lassoing reef sharks by the tail.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: While on the job at an Florida golf club, an experienced golf ball diver is attacked by a territorial, 400-pound alligator. Jeff Tanswell's snorkeling trip turns into a bloody battle for his life when he is dragged under by an 12-foot saltwater crocodile.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Meet Ian Gordon, one of the world’s leading shark specialists, and encounter nature's most notorious shark, the ultimate predator: the Great White.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Riley Elliott is off to the Bay of Islands to attach the first of his high tech satellite transmitters for the season. He won't just be on the boat however, he plans to get into the water and hand feed the Blues.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ian finds a population of Pelagic Threshers performing strange behaviors. He'll dive with one of the world’s rarest sharks to get to the bottom of it.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In the waters off New Zealand, host Kina Scollay leaps into the water with a pod of orca. Watching his back is Ingrid Visser, world renowned orca expert.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Until remote cameras were invented, no one had ever seen the prickly shark. Shark Gordon is hot on the scene to check out these mysterious sharks.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Oceanic White Tip is one of the only sharks that makes Ian Gordon nervous. They prey on whatever they can find, including shipwrecked humans.

programme.title: When Shark Meets Croc
programme.desc: The aggressive ocean predator, the bull shark, is venturing up the rivers of Africa's coast. But lurking here is a deadly killer: the Nile crocodile.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: While hiking through Montana's Glacier National Park, Johan and Jenna Otter are attacked by a raging grizzly intent on protecting her cubs. In a remote British Columbia nature park, Patti and Kelly McConnell are mauled by a hungry 400-pound black bear.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The New Zealand sea lion is more than just the most endangered sea lion on Earth.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shark Gordon is called upon to do something that has never been accomplished successfully: to tag a fully grown whale shark. Will he succeed?

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: It is believed that sharks mistake humans for other fish, but can sharks really not tell the difference? Shark Gordon intends to find out.

programme.title: Shark Gordon S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: At about three feet long, the Port Jackson shark is not one of the most dangerous. Ian Gordon is on a mission to observe them during breeding season.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Johnny rescues a python in the poo, Julia starts a new business venture before facing off against two very deadly snakes.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Wiltshire's police officers round up suspects in sex crime cases, receiving three times as many reports of voyeurism and male exposure as any other force in the UK.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: 33 year old Dilson has been rushed to King's by ambulance with severe knife wounds. Dilson was stabbed in the head and neck as he was leaving a nightclub in the early hours of the morning.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A woman whose mysterious attacks have left her with a foreign accent; a man searching for treatment for his disintegrating eyes & a women with a skin condition that turns her into a human sketch pad.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Just 5% of families in the UK account for half of all arrests. Wiltshire Police repeatedly deal with one particular family who are responsible for theft, assaults, joyriding and public disorder.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: We meet the girl who couldn't stop shaking, The woman who spent 12 years feeling dizzy and disorientated and the student whose weight mysteriously doubled in 18 months.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: 26-year-old Nicholas has been punched in the face in a random attack - his jaw is fractured and dislocated and he can't close his mouth or speak.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: 47-year-old Chrissie was crossing the road when she was hit by a motorcycle. The side of Chrissie's face took the brunt of the impact and the main concern is potential bleeding in the brain.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: From the time he's born, Ricky Getch is plagued by constant respiratory infections and a bizarre inability to grow that sends his parents on a desperate search for answers.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Exploring the link between poverty and rising crime, a frightened 14-year-old schoolgirl reports a break-in at her home. Also, a shoplifter admits he's been driven to extreme measures to survive.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: 39-year-old Neil was driving a friend's sports car when he was involved in a head-on collision with another vehicle. Trapped in the wreckage for over an hour, he's been flown by HEMS to King's A&E.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Can Doctors help Kylie Monica who was born with life-threatening birth defects. 17yr old star athlete Michael Iniguez is fighting for his life, when a seemingly normal sore throat becomes deadly.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: This episode examines what happens when members of the public take the law into their own hands, and the dramatic consequences the emergency services have to deal with.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Liana Jones is blindsided by crippling sinus pains, her husband is forced to take matters in his own hands to save her. Robin Akbar has to face her own mortality when debilitating symptoms take over

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: This episode examines the rise in racially-aggravated hate crimes in Wiltshire, including race hate through social media, and a nine-year-old girl facing racist language for the first time.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Louise is having her first child at 45 after years of fearing she'd never experience motherhood.

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency AU S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: With unbearable waiting times, crews help a schoolgirl whose life is threatened by anaphylactic shock, a woman who's been badly cut in a pub fight, and an elderly women who has fractured her hip.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: a man cut down in his prime by crippling all over body pain. A retired school teacher who's head has been in a spin for the last sixty years & the mystery of why a young woman vomits almost every day

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: We meet the four-year-old boy, who's hardly growing, A mum barely able to breathe and a woman suffering from mysterious pains all over her body.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steve, a 48-year-old retired soldier, arrives at King's for special treatment after driving off a road and being found unconscious at the wheel of his car.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A young man has had a severe reaction to the recreational drug GBL. As he's wheeled into Resus by paramedics, accompanied by police, his limbs are flailing and he's spitting at the staff.

programme.title: Medical Mysteries S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We meet a teenager who suddenly loses control of his lower body; a family overshadowed by a sinister condition, and a man whose features never stopped growing.

programme.title: ONE Born Every Minute UK S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Louise and her husband endured a six year struggle to conceive.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tammy Gilleland thought she the flu she mysteriously ends up paralyzed from the chest down. Nadine Miller's world is slowly disappearing before her eyes as an unknown illness pushes her into blindness

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After moving houses, and months of strange behaviour, 11 year old Sammy stops walking and only hops, the doctors are the only hope to discover the cause of his bizarre symptoms.

programme.title: Mystery Diagnosis S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lonnie's dreams of playing in the NFL are destroyed when boils develop on his head.Plus, Theresa suffers sight loss during her pregnancy, physicians struggle to find a diagnosis.

programme.title: 24 Hours In A&E S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: 23-year-old motorcyclist Richard is rushed into A&E by helicopter, having collided with a parked car at speed. Flung through the air, he hit a car's bonnet before landing face down on the pavement.

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Nitro Circus stuntman, Andy Bell joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to take a look at some "Nitro Sideshows," take a look at the phenomenon of "Street Prancing,"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel go "Flame Dumb," test out their hand skills in "Snatch Masters," and slow-mo man's best friend in "Goooooooddddd Boooooooyyyyy."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 722

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 27

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 710
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel meet with motorcycle madman Robbie Maddison showcase some "Mini Madd Asses", cause some serious "Grammage"

programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, the hosts of The Fighter and The Kid podcast, Bryan Callen and Brendan Schaub, join Rob, Chanel, and Sterling to talk about other "Fighters and Funny People,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 817

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 827
programme.desc: Tonight on an all-new Ridiculousness, the legendary television host Jerry Springer joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to chant "Jerry! Jerry! Jerry!", watch some "Beastdowns" and post some photos on "Injurgram."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, 50 Cent joins Rob, Stee-Lo, and Chanel to discuss his "Crappy Birthday," people who are "Built Like 50," and others who, like 50, are real "Show Stealers."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to tell some "Dirty Secrets", taste some "All Natural Beef" and clench for the category "Spike My Butt"."

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Spooky Fish: When Stan is given a fish by his Aunt, he has a feeling there's something not quite right about it. Sure enough it's not long before there's evil goings on. (In spooky vision!) (S2, E15)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Merry Christmas, Charlie Manson!: Cartman's Uncle Howard escapes from prison with another inmate, Charlie Manson. The boys want to go see Mr Hankey at the mall but no one will take them. (S2, E16)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Gnomes (a.k.a. Underpants Gnomes): The boys must write an essay for school. Tweek suggests they write about gnomes that visit him every night and steal his pants. What will they discover? (S2, E17)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Rainforest Schmainforest: The boys go to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the "Getting Gay With Kids" choir tour, but Cartman is on a mission to cause havoc. Jennifer Aniston guests. (S3, E01)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Spontaneous Combustion: The citizens of South Park are randomly exploding and it's up to Stan to find the cause. Kyle discovers his dad is having problems with erectile dysfunction. (S3, E02)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The Succubus (a.k.a. Chef's Mama): The boys discover that Chef has a new girl who has changed him from a free-spirited, soul-singing hipster to that of a mediocre, religious paper pusher. (S3, E03)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Jakovasaurs: While camping, the boys discover the last two Jakovasaurs (a parody of Jar Jar Binks) on the planet. Will the townsfolk welcome them with open arms or find them very annoying? (S3, E04)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tweek vs. Craig: The boys coerce two of their classmates, Tweek and Craig, into a schoolyard fight. Craig learns martial arts with the aid of Cartman. Tweek is taught to box by Uncle Jimbo. (S3, E05)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Sexual Harassment Panda: After a school educational talk from Petey the Panda, Cartman decides to sue Stan for sexual harassment. Suing fever starts to grip the entire town! (S3, E06)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Cat O*gy (1): Stan's sister Shelley babysits Cartman and invites her unsuitable boyfriend, Skyler, to join her. Meanwhile Cartman's cat is on heat and it's not long before he's got company! (S3, E07)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Stan's parents drag him along to Mr. Mackey's meteor shower party, where he is sent down into the basement to play with Pip, Butters and Dougie.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Jewbilee (3): As all of South Park waits for the meteor shower to begin, Kyle and Ike go into the wilderness for a Jew Scouts Jewbilee. Kenny tags along and takes on the king of the woods... (S3, E09)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Korn's Groovy Pirate Ghost Mystery: The boys are being plagued by the 5th graders and South Park is overrun by Pirate Ghosts. Nu-Metal band Korn must save the day! (Scooby-Doo parody). (S3, E10)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Chinpokomon: Stan, Cartman, and Kenny are caught up in the latest fad from Japan, a cartoon called Chinpokomon - but what is the secret plan behind the show's anti-American sentiments...? (S3, E11)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Hooked on Monkey Fonics: The boys compete against a couple of home schooled kids in South Park's annual spelling bee. (S3, E12)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin In Space: Marvin is back! He and the boys travel around the world in an alien spaceship on a food-gathering mission, hotly pursued by the CIA and Sally Struthers. (S3, E13)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual reenactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- An extravaganza of holiday songs are performed in unique South Park style, hosted by Mr. Hankey.

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Are You There God, It's Me Jesus: Cartman claims to be going through puberty, making the boys jealous, and Jesus promises a New Year's Eve spectacle - so books Rod Stewart to play Las Vegas! (S3, E16)

programme.title: South Park S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Worldwide Recorder Concert: The class visit Mr Garrison's hometown for a recorder concert, where they attempt to find the mysterious 'brown noise'. What part does Kenny G play in this? (S3, E17)

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: When Ms. Barch assigns lab partners for a behavioral science project, Daria is paired with disinterested jock Kevin, and Brittany is paired with the sleazy Upchuck.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Wilbur Cobb tells a campfire story about Galoot Wranglers. Ren goes crazy and is sent to a home. Here we see the whole cast of the Ren & Stimpy show has gone nuts.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Trent agrees to help Jane and Daria on their multimedia project, and Daria feels threatened when Jane falls for a guy named Tom.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: Lawndale's reputation takes a major hit when an injured Kevin leaves the football team after a motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: While working on the school yearbook, Daria takes a liking to a formerly homeschooled student with many eccentricities.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 409
programme.desc: The residents of Lawndale are drawn to a new big box store that caters to their various needs, where Daria and Jane look for gummi bears for an art project.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Trent asks Daria for help finding a birthday gift for Jane, the two find themselves at a piercing parlor and Quinn and Helen team up for a fashion show.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After being drafted into Satan's dark army, Twayne and Mark must do their patriotic duty and end the world.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Randall's new arm lands him on the DOI's intramural football team, and Callie pimps out Leonard.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Stimpy's nose goblin, Frank Snotra, becomes famous. However when he's ready to perform, he gets stage fright. The side kick union is going on a massive strike and Stimpy is alerted.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: When Helen takes the family on a trip to look good for her boss, they find themselves subjected to intense psychotherapy to unearth their problems.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 412
programme.desc: When a kitchen fire does damage to the Morgendorffer home, the family goes to an expensive hotel while Daria stays with Jane and Trent at their house.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Clara appears on "Extreme Vaginal Makeover"; demented Toot gets committed by her roommates.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: Daria questions her relationship with Tom as their six-month anniversary approaches, and Jake pursues a new career with an internet start-up.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The death of Captain Girl forces Captain Hero to fight crime and grief solo. Toot adopts a baby.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Wooldoor discovers the healing powers of his bodily fluids. Ling-Ling finds love.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 411
programme.desc: A strange series of coincidences convinces Quinn that she has a guardian angel looking out for her, and Brittany's parents throw a party to celebrate her grades.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: When Jane's brother Trent is asked to perform at the Alternapalooza music festival with his band Mystik Spiral, Jane and Daria decide to accompany them on the road.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Rumors begin to swirl at school when a mysterious rash sends Daria to the hospital.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The roommates get a surprise family visitor. Toot, Wooldoor and Xandir abuse Ling-Ling.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When the roommates depart for a trip to the mall, Clara assumes they've been Raptured.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Callie is promptly promoted after turning into a man, causing strife in her relationship with Mark.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Helen and Jake realize how much they've changed while spending a weekend with their friends from college, and Jane and Daria join Trent on a trip to the flea market.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: A rabid Bat Boy takes a bite out of Mark, transforming him into New York City's latest superhero.

programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are going to be the first dog and cat sent up to space in the Russian space program. In the spirit of the Hatfields and McCoys, Ren and Stimpy present the Nitwits and the Dimwits.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 8

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are snowed in. Stimpy amuses himself with watching dark TV, whistling in a bottle and other mundane activities. Ren and Stimpy are watching TV when they see the opening of a new jail.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Mark accidentally reactivates Leonard's magical arranged marriage.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 405

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Wooldoor gets his own progressive children's TV show, and Toot chases dreams of a hot dog truck.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Daria and Jane record a film about Quinn's daily life for a school project with the hopes of making her look ridiculous, but Daria's conscience begins to weigh on her.

programme.desc: Stimpy is becoming dangerously stupid. Ren is injected into Stimpy in a race against time to find the problem. Pierre convinces Ren and Stimpy to grow up and get a man's job - lumberjacking.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: Quinn and the Fashion Club look for ways to make a difference, and Daria feels self-conscious when she considers submitting a story to a publication.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Callie makes an evil Mark clone to compete in the DOI bowling league tournament.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The housemates take a trip back in time as tots with a taste for murder.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Jake and Helen take off on a marriage seminar, and Daria and Quinn take a road trip to bail out Jane and Mystik Spiral.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: When Jane's family members all come home at once, she and Trent temporarily move into Daria's house, Helen and Jake pick Jane's brain, and Daria imagines a future with Trent.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find an abandoned circus clown at their doorstep. While Ren DOES NOT want to keep him, Stimpy pleads and begs until Ren agrees. Stimpy the mad scientist replaces Ren's brain.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Daria and Jodie are invited to tour a school for gifted students, their parents struggle to get along, and Quinn finds herself at odds with her own friends.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: After a nearly disastrous driving lesson, Daria debates whether to switch from glasses to contacts, and Kevin experiments with a new accessory.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Captain Hero turns to performance-enhancing drugs. Wooldoor and Clara start a lemonade stand.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Twayne quits after getting roasted at his DOI 10-year anniversary party, leaving Mark in charge.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Mark walks a young couple through the trials of vampire love, and "Larry King disease" ravages New York City.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers visit Jack and Helen's alma mater as part of a college prep course, Daria learns the truth about academia, and Quinn gets a taste of Greek life.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Randall shambles his way onto an all-creature reality show, and a troll wrestles with riddle addiction.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Looking for refuge, Ren and Stimpy sneak into a model house of the future. Once inside they try out all of the modern conveniences.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy host your favorite nature show; Untamed World. In this episode they go in search of the dying breed of the lummox. Deep in the wood they find a freckled red neck known as Booger Red.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Clara's roommates attempt to find her Prince Charming after she reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Mark accidentally outs Randall as a zombie, and Leonard tries to identify a strange new creature.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Quinn's attempt to bring up her grades to avoid failing English alters her reputation, and Daria faces an identity crisis.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Chris wants to make dinner for John, who is totally against holidays.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake receives a letter and is shocked to find out that his late grandmother has left him $25,000.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Margaret tells John that a letter for a medical conference has arrived, but John scoffs, saying it's just an excuse for doctors to have a weekend in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chris, Jake, Hector, and Linda are at the diner. Chris serves Linda her breakfast as John walks in and tells Linda that she needs to get to the office and help Margaret.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris and Jake complain about the cold weather when John walks in, happy because it's cold and flu season, which means more patients.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 12
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake is looking for someone to go downtown and pick up Stevie Wonder concert tickets for him with no luck.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Chris fears that John is going to break up with her after he invites her to dinner at a nice restaurant with no explanation.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: An enraged and irascible Dr. John Becker (Ted Danson) enters the diner in his typical bad mood and sends the patrons fleeing.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the diner to find Reggie and Jake discussing their plans to take a sculpting class.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Becker is bombarded by sexual overtones throughout the day, beginning with a sensual dream that is interrupted by a neighbor's blaring music.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Becker enters the diner to find Reggie in a rotten mood. After some prodding, she reveals that her ballplayer boyfriend just dumped her.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: While railing on the evils of Beanie Babies, Becker gets annoyed when an overly friendly delivery guy named Todd stops by the diner.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While Becker is at the diner with Jake and Reggie, an odd little man named Bob enters.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Becker is livid when he is awakened by a brightly flickering streetlight outside his window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Becker throws his back out at home while trying to close a stuck window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Already in a bad mood, Becker vents his frustration to a man on his cell phone, whose wife is in labor.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A reporter makes trouble for Becker when he writes an article depicting Becker's "non-politically correct" behavior.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Becker promises a friend that he will write a medical article for him, but gets frustrated with numerous distractions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Becker arrives at the diner on Valentine’s Day, he is displeased to find wall-to-wall make-out sessions.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker has a fear that midgets bring him bad luck and is spooked by the new water guy, who happens to be vertically challenged.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker learns that an elderly patient, Mr. Fowler, has suffered from a heart attack and calls his daughter to tell her the bad news.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker is upset when he learns that his ex-wife has written a pop-psychology book starring him as "Angry Man."

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker yells at a woman for letting her child cry uncontrollably, then rants about her bad parenting skills.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Becker is outraged as he tells the gang at the diner that someone broke into his apartment and stole his computer.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Becker starts off the day in a cranky mood when he finds a stray cat in his office, which apparently crawled through a broken window.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Becker arrives at the office carrying the parking meter that ate his quarter.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Becker's patient, Jimmy, is a penniless scalper who is unable to afford his ulcer treatment.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 21
programme.desc: John has an unusual run of good luck...and he doesn't trust it.

programme.title: Becker S1 Ep. 22
programme.desc: On Jake's way out to meet his girlfriend, Becker warns him that his zipper is down.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Becker (Ted Danson) performs his doctorly duties at the diner when a woman begins to choke on her food.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: John tries to quit smoking and ends up exchanging one urge for another, sex.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Linda gets a Little Sister and learns a lesson about rebellion while John meddles in Reggie's love life.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We learn more about Linda's upbringing and gain insight into her world after a series of mishaps which led her to quit her job. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Reggie chases a high school fantasy, by reuniting with a high school crush who ends up being a jerk.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker has an extra ticket to Chicago and Reggie decides to go.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A friend of and an old friend of Beckers is in town.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker gets shot and Frances Fisher guest stars as his doctor. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Frances Fisher guest stars again as Dr. Elizabeth Carson and reveals to Becker her attraction to him

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Becker and Liz realize that they have a wacky relationship because they both snoop through each other's stuff and Bob wins and loses to lottery tickets.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: We find out how Jake becomes blind and watch him begin to come to terms with the accident, his friend, and himself. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- Becker starts to appreciate life after spending an evening in the morgue identifying one of his patients.

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker deals with chaos at work while Reggie studies for a test and Margaret attends the reading of a will. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker starts a secretive new health regime to lower his cholesterol, which leads people to talk about his unknown condition. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker S2 Ep. 15

programme.title: Out of Time
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence.

programme.title: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues.

programme.title: The Rules
programme.desc: Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides it_s time for his officers to get back on track.

programme.title: Every Man
programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: I Never
programme.desc: When a child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal.

programme.title: Surprises
programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.title: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz.

programme.title: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: A routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together.

programme.title: Skeletons
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer.

programme.title: For Better, for Worse
programme.desc: Things get complicated when the team gets called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens.

programme.title: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting

programme.title: Runaway
programme.desc: A wild stallion escapes from Sam’s ranch during a burglary and Amy will stop at nothing to find him.

programme.title: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: Amy discovers a teen with a gift for horses at Cooper’s therapy centre.

programme.title: Blood and Water

programme.title: Happy Ever After

programme.title: Bluebird

programme.title: Brand New Day

programme.title: The Long Game

programme.title: Leaving a Legacy

programme.title: On the Ropes

programme.title: Spark to Flame

programme.title: Higher Ground
programme.desc: When flood evacuees come to Hudson, Amy works with a traumatized horse. Jack and Lisa help a young couple.

programme.title: Into the Wild
programme.desc: Amy helps a unique animal from an abandoned zoo. Jack and Lisa work through difficulties in their relationship

programme.title: Vigil

programme.title: Running Down a Dream
programme.desc: Amy teaches Lyndy how to barrel race. Logan’s father arrives at Heartland. Katie gets her ears pierced.

programme.title: True Colours, New Tricks

programme.title: Lurking in the Shadows

programme.title: Head Over Heels
programme.desc: Amy agrees to let Logan take the lead with a new client horse. Lou struggles to reconnect with Katie.

programme.desc: Amy agrees to let Logan take the lead with a new client horse. Lou struggles to reconnect with Katie.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S8 Ep. 22

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 1

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan suspects a cunning D.A. in the murder of an acquitted defendant.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 11

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 12

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: After winning everyone's favourite finger licking good reward, one of the Castaways snaffles an Idol clue for themselves, but has the lucky find been spotted by their alliance?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: It's all fun and games until an Idol comes between a couple of Castaways. After one of the toughest Immunity Challenges yet, could new alliances lead to a voting tug of war at Tribal Council?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Backlash from the most devious move in Australian Survivor history hits camp. Desperate to win the Immunity Challenge, one Castaway is looking strong, but will they be able to hold out?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Trying to get your Tribe to believe your story can make or break your game, as one Castaway tries to spell out the truth. Three Castaways are on the outer, and bond together over a shared experience.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 19
programme.desc: As castaways return to camp from Purgatory, alliances are seemingly reformed, A tribemate selflessly gives up their reward, and the game is flipped once more as Tribal Council sees an advantage played

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Fallout from last night's Tribal Council divides the remaining tribemates. From playing in the middle to striking from the top, one Castaway proves they were merely biding their time to make big moves

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Reeling after the latest Tribal Council, the remaining Castaways take stock of what's occurred and where it leaves them in the game. A Reward Challenge side deal leaves some tribemates on the outer.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A puzzle Immunity Challenge separates the muscles from the strategic, but will the result upset an alliance? At Tribal Council, nothing goes to plan as unwelcome surprises leave everyone on edge.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The end is nigh as five Castaways are whittled down to four. At the Immunity Challenge, everyone digs deep but one tribemate pulls out all the stops, giving them a great shot at being Sole Survivor.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S7 Ep. 24
programme.desc: After 47 days in the Queensland wilderness, it all comes down to this. An epic challenge weeds out the weak from the strong, and one castaway is crowned Sole Survivor, walking away with $500,000
